item.title: Move CHANGELOG.md to docs/CHANGELOG.md and update references
item.intent: All documentation must live in docs/ for consistency — changelog is documentation, not a build artifact.
item.description: CHANGELOG.md exists at repo root with 15 well-structured releases (v0.1.0 through v0.3.2) using Added/Changed/Fixed/Removed/Documentation sections. This is a pure file move. Update any references to CHANGELOG.md in README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, and other files to point to docs/CHANGELOG.md. Consider leaving a symlink at the root for tools that expect CHANGELOG.md at the repo root, but only if a concrete tool dependency is identified.
steps: Search all files for references to CHANGELOG.md and update paths to docs/CHANGELOG.md
Verify no build scripts or CI workflows reference CHANGELOG.md at the root
acceptanceCriteria: docs/CHANGELOG.md exists with all original content preserved
CHANGELOG.md no longer exists at repo root
All references across the repo point to docs/CHANGELOG.md
CI workflows (if any reference CHANGELOG.md) still work
